content.en:
I have to say that the competition in this holy war is very huge, and there are too many geniuses.

Any genius who gets the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is afraid that he can sweep everything.

In the blink of an eye, two days passed.

The holy war began.

Jihadist Circle, Central Region.

There are countless domain ancestors gathered here, and there are even more domain ancestors than half-step domain ancestors, and the half-step domain ancestors who can basically come here are all over-limiters, and they are half-step domain ancestors who have come to participate in the war.

Ye Tian stayed with the participants of the Battle Gate, but at this time, he was shocked to find that there were two more contestants in the Battle Gate.

Originally, with his words, there were eighteen contestants, but now there are twenty.

Not only that, but there are more participants in the other Holy Gates than in the information.

"Who are these two?"

The Holy Son of Kamigawa looked at the other two people in the battle gate, revealing a solemn expression.

"A real seeded player!"

Kamigawa Seiko thought to himself.

The Star Feather Holy Son also looked at the two of them, and his expression did not change much.

He had already guessed that there were other players hidden in the battle gate, and now this guess has come true.

However, he doesn't think he's inferior to these two.

Everyone will hide some strength, and before the real fight, it is impossible to say who is strong and who is weak.

It didn't take long for the players from the major forces to participate in the battle basically arrived.

And the domain ancestors of the major forces also began to discuss, deciding the details of the holy war.

At this time, Ye Tian was very happy, copying the talent to probe the talent of the people present, and copying the forbidden talent that he had not copied one by one.

I have to say that almost all the people here have forbidden talents, and only some servants of the major forces, domain ancestors, do not have forbidden talents.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian sensed the existence of the Holy Fu, and there was more than one of them.

"Sure enough, there is a Holy Endowment!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

If those domain ancestors were shielding themselves with all their might, copying their talents might not be able to detect their talents, but in this case, these domain ancestors were defenseless at all, so they were detected by Ye Tian one by one.

Perhaps the Domain Ancestors here were only a very small part of the Dark Sacred Domain, but from a few Supreme Domain Ancestors, he felt the Holy Endowment.

Moreover, there are six half-step domain ancestors who also have holy endowments on them.

"Among the domain ancestors, there are three people who have holy endowments, and six half-step domain ancestors have holy endowments, and they have a total of nine holy endowments, all of which have been copied!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Holy Endowment is very powerful, and once it is copied and fused with your own Holy Endowment, you can enhance your Holy Empowerment.

Moreover, Ye Tian found that even if these people had holy endowments, they basically only had one door, and only one person had two holy endowments, and that person was a half-step domain ancestor, and he was also a participant in the battle this time.

"Woman, lightly clothed saint!"

Ye Tian knew the title of the other party from the profile of the copying talent, but the content that could be detected was relatively small, only that she was a light-clothed saintess, and the rest was not clear.

And among the information collected by Tuba Yuzu, there is no information about this lightly-clothed saint at all.

The other party has two holy endowments, one is the divine clothing endowment, and the other is the golden thorn endowment.

Obviously, there are two kinds of sacred endowments, one for defense and one for attack.

From her talent, it can be guessed that she must have cultivated two holy techniques, and maybe she has reached the consummation realm, but she can't say for sure.

"It's a fierce rival!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

His advantage is the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, which is the first Holy Body in the Dark Sanctuary and is naturally very powerful.

Moreover, he has practiced eight holy skills, and he can also use holy skills to control the body, which can increase other holy skills.

Therefore, when it comes to holy techniques, he is almost omnipotent.

That's his strength!

Abrupt.

A figure appeared in the void, attracting everyone's attention.

He is the host of this holy war, the supreme domain ancestor from the battle gate, the Fire Emblem War Ancestor!

After the Fire Emblem War Ancestor appeared, he spoke: "The Holy War is divided into three links, the first link is a group battle, as long as you defeat ten opponents, you can get the next round of chances. In order to ensure that the strong are not eliminated, once ten opponents are defeated, they will be moved away directly!"

I saw the Fire Pattern War Ancestor, and pointed out!

Bang!!!!

The Void Creation, a huge, almost endless arena appeared.

"Get in!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestral Road.

Whoa!!!!

Nearly a million geniuses entered the ring, and the battle began.

Everyone is looking for weak geniuses to fight, as long as they defeat ten people, they can qualify for the next round, so if the strong meet the strong, they will hardly fight, otherwise it will be a waste of time.

If there are really two of the top double overlimiters who fight to the end, resulting in only the two of them left, they will be eliminated.

In that case, it will be too embarrassing, and even the forces behind them are afraid that they will be severely punished.

Ye Tian entered the ring and quickly locked on to a half-step domain ancestor.

Burst!

A spear stabbed down and killed the opponent directly.

Of course, this isn't a real kill, and no one dies in the Warworld Tower.

Soon, the genius regrouped outside the ring.

"Am I defeated?"

The man was a little dumbfounded, he just entered the ring, and before he could start to show himself, he was killed in seconds, and the speed of this elimination was too fast.

"Unlucky, I met a real top genius!"

The man thought.

In fact, this first round is also about luck, if you are lucky, if you are not strong, you can also advance to the second round.

Soon, Ye Tian killed ten geniuses and qualified for the second round.

Wow!

Ye Tian's body moved, and he appeared outside the ring, obviously being moved.

Ten hours passed after the battle of millions of geniuses, and finally ended all the battles.

All 20 contestants passed the second round, and none of them were eliminated.

Almost none of the people of the Holy Gate were eliminated in the first round, and if there were geniuses of the Holy Gate who were eliminated in the first round, it would be too shameless, or too unlucky.

Once such a situation occurs, I am afraid that the Holy Gate will also be ridiculed, and the eliminated Holy Son is estimated to be deprived of the Holy Son's place after he returns.

A million geniuses eliminated 900,000 geniuses at once, and only 100,000 geniuses remained.

And the geniuses eliminated were almost all geniuses from major cities, as well as a few geniuses from thousands of sects and holy lands.

At this time, the Fire Emblem War Ancestor announced the rules for the second round.

"In the second round, the group stage will be held, divided into 100 groups, and each group will play 100 games randomly. In the end, based on the results, it was decided to let 1,000 participants advance to the third round. "

Soon, grouping began.

And Ye Tian was assigned to the third group!
